topic: describing center and variation from a data table
latex:
The table shows the number of miles hiked per person on a weekend. Describe the center and variation of the data set.

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
\multicolumn{5}{|c|}{\textbf{Hiking Distance (km)}} \\
\hline
1 & 2 & 4 & 5 & 3 \\
\hline
3 & 3 & 4 & 2 & 3 \\
\hline
5 & 4 & 3 & 5 & 4 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{center}
